## Test Plan

<!-- How to verify this PR works correctly -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npx playwright test`)

## Screenshots

<!-- If UI changes, include before/after screenshots -->

## Constitution Compliance

- [ ] **I. User-Centric**: Feature validated against a concrete homeowner scenario
- [ ] **II. Data Accuracy**: Any plant/spatial/cost data is sourced and validated
- [ ] **III. Test-First**: Red-Green-Refactor cycle followed for all changes
- [ ] **IV. Incremental Delivery**: PR delivers standalone, demonstrable value
- [ ] **V. Simplicity**: Simplest solution chosen, no unnecessary complexity

## Quality Gates

- [ ] Spec gate: P1 user story exists and is independently testable
- [ ] Plan gate: Constitution Check section confirms compliance
- [ ] Test gate: All acceptance scenarios have passing automated tests
- [ ] Data gate: New data is sourced, validated, and documented
- [ ] Simplicity gate: Complexity Tracking is empty or fully justified
